title: Crispy Brussels Sprouts with Citrus-Curry Sauce
description: A flavorful and tangy twist on traditional roasted Brussels sprouts, elevated by a citrusy curry sauce.
instructions: Trim the Brussels sprouts and cut them in half.
Toss the Brussels sprouts with 1 tablespoon of coconut oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the Brussels sprouts in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
While the Brussels sprouts are roasting, combine the citrus juice, curry powder, and honey in a small saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Remove the Brussels sprouts from the oven and toss with the citrus-curry sauce.
Serve hot and garnished with additional citrus, if desired.
